title: The Disproportionate Power of Small, High-Value Datasets in Seismic AI
subtitle: Why a tightly curated catalog of just a few thousand traces is the secret to unlocking massive performance gains in regional AI models.
description: While foundation models require millions of traces, local fine-tuning only requires a few thousand. Discover the immense value of small, highly curated regional datasets in adapting off-the-shelf seismic AI.
excerpt: Off-the-shelf deep learning models often struggle with local noise. Discover why curating a small, high-value dataset of just a few thousand traces is the secret to unlocking massive performance gains in regional seismic networks.
hero_caption: Visualizing the fine-tuning process: a small, precise local dataset sharpening a generalized global AI model.
hero_aria: Concept art showing a massive global dataset filtering down into a specialized local AI mechanism.
